question: How many days do I get?
expected_answer: Insufficient evidence: the question is ambiguous and needs clarification.
answer: Full-time employees receive 20 paid annual leave days per calendar year. Employees may carry over at most 5 unused annual leave days, and carried days expire on March 31 of the following year. A Severity 1 postmortem must be completed within 5 business days after service restoration. A new employee has 30 calendar days from the start date to complete benefits enrollment. A Priority 1 customer case has a 15-minute initial response target, available 24 hours a day and 7 days a week.
